title: Optim
description: An optimization modpack that focuses on both the client and the server.
body:
Optim is an optimization modpack that focuses on both the client and the server. It makes use of a vast range of optimzation mods, using popular ones such as [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium), [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium), and [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core), while also making using of lesser known mods such as [Client Side Noteblocks](https://modrinth.com/mod/clientsidenoteblocks), [Compact Chat](https://modrinth.com/mod/compact-chat), [Clean F3](https://modrinth.com/mod/clean-f3), and more.

# Features
- More FPS
- Bug fixes
- Faster language load times
- Faster world and server load times
- More readable chat
- and more!

# FPS Comparison
**Vanilla**: 70+ FPS\
**Simply Optimized**: 150+ FPS\
**Optim**: 300+ FPS\
*Tested on a GTX 1660 Ti GPU with a Xeon E5-2670 CPU*

# FAQ
Q: Will Optim support versions before / after 1.21?\
A: Most likely! The modpack is pretty lightweight so it shouldn't be hard to port it to other versions.

Q: Forge?\
A: No.

Q: Shaders?\
A: No.

Q: Vanilla-like?\
A: Hell yeah.
